summary: Frontend testing of VenuLock landing page hero refinement. ALL 16 CRITICAL AND STANDARD REQUIREMENTS PASS. Key changes verified: dropdown overlay not clipped (overflow-hidden fix), no label text, #B8963F CTA color with white text, 480px card width, toggle styles correct.

CRITICAL_city_dropdown_overlay.details: City dropdown opens as overlay ABOVE page content with 12 visible options. NOT clipped by sections below hero. overflow-hidden removed from hero section.

CRITICAL_mobile_cta_above_fold.details: CTA button bottom at 430.3px - well above 844px fold. 413.6px pixels to spare.

no_label_text.details: No 'WHERE ARE YOU CELEBRATING?' label visible. Only placeholder 'Select your city' in dropdown button.

toggle_active_style.details: Active tab (City) has white bg with subtle shadow (bg-white shadow-[0_1px_3px]).

toggle_inactive_style.details: Inactive tab (Near Me) has muted text color #AAA (text-[#AAA]).

cta_bg_color.details: CTA button bg color is rgb(184, 150, 63) = #B8963F as specified.

cta_text_color.details: CTA text color is white rgb(255, 255, 255) - NOT dark/black.

cta_no_shimmer.details: CTA has NO shimmer/gradient animation (animation: none).

microcopy.details: 'Free venue matching. No booking fees.' visible with data-testid='cta-microcopy'.

search_card_width.details: Search card width is 432px (within max-width of 480px).

city_navigation.details: Selecting Mumbai → CTA navigates to /venues/search?city=Mumbai correctly.

nearme_mode_text.details: Near Me mode shows 'Discover venues around you.' text.

nearme_location_btn.details: 'Use My Location' button (data-testid='get-location-btn') is visible and functional.

desktop_hero_elements.details: Tagline 'Find. Compare. Lock.', subtitle, and trust line all visible on desktop.

header_navigation.details: Discover, Weddings, Corporate, Sign In, Get Started all visible and functional.

sections_below_hero.details: All sections render: trust badges, categories, featured venues, how it works, why choose us, stats, testimonials, footer.

mobile_chatbot_scroll_gated.details: Chat button hidden initially (opacity: 0), visible after scrolling 600px (opacity: 1).

test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero refinement complete: overflow-hidden removed from hero section (moved to parallax container only) so dropdown overlay works. CTA is #B8963F with white text, no shimmer. Search card max 480px. Toggle has white active tab with shadow, inactive #AAA. Label removed - only 'Select your city' placeholder. Mobile CTA is 413px above fold. ChatBot scroll-gated on mobile.
